content: Legal client intake software (Lawmatics, Clio Grow, Lead Docket): standard features = lead capture, intake forms, pipeline tracking, automated follow-up sequences, appointment scheduling, e-signature, conversion analytics showing where prospects drop off, lead scoring, assignment rules. Key benchmark stats cited: average firm converts ~14% of inquiries; top performers 40-50%; leads contacted within 5 min are 21x more likely to convert. AI lead scoring and automated follow-up now standard in the category.
